title: AI Frontier vs Open Source: The Gap is CLOSING FAST! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof asserts that the capability gap between open-source AI systems and frontier models is narrowing rapidly, accelerating from annual to monthly paces. He characterizes this as a sign that innovation velocity is increasing across the AI industry.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that the capability gap between open-source AI systems and frontier models is closing rapidly, with the lag compressing from a yearly cadence to a monthly one. Imhof frames the shrinking gap as evidence that innovation velocity is rising across the AI industry. The takeaway: open-source models are catching up to frontier releases faster than before.
